privileged_info_summary: Verified all configuration parameters required for the OpenSearch ISM policy creation task. The policy 'wazuh-alert-retention' must target the 'wazuh-alerts-*' index pattern, accessible at 'https://localhost:9200' with 'admin:SecretPassword'. The specific retention periods (30d for hot-to-warm and 90d for warm-to-delete transitions) exactly match the requirements laid out in the task instructions and validation logic.
